body.title: Granny /health command — queue + runner status
body.result: granny_health_snapshot() in devices/granny/health.py: CC sessions, queue depth by status+size, orphan detection, routing gaps; /api/granny/health endpoint in web server; /health skill
body.description:
Granny needs a zero-inference status snapshot: active CC sessions (tmux cc-T-* count), queue depth by status, orphaned in_progress tickets, and routing gaps (ticket tags with no dispatch edge). Callable as a skill /health and also queryable by the web server for Granny's status pane.

**Affected files:** new skill skills/health/ (or devices/granny/health.py); devices/granny/daemon.py (expose health data); devices/web_server/server.py (optional /api/granny/health endpoint)
**Design rules:** zero inference — pure data aggregation from cc_queue.py list + tmux list-sessions + routing edge table; log every call at INFO
**Scope boundary:** IN: active CC session count, queue depth by status/size, orphaned ticket list, routing gap detection. OUT: circuit breaker control (separate ticket), Granny restart.
**Completion criteria:** Running /health (or calling the endpoint) returns a structured summary. Running it when there are orphaned tickets shows them. Running it when a tag has no routing edge shows the gap. No LLM inference calls made.
